title: pericopsis angolensis
intro: Pericopsis angolensis, also known as the African yellow-wood or yellowwood, is a medium-sized to large tree native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Pericopsis angolensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the bark of the tree is used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, decoctions, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
